zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Berkeley於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Sir Maurice Berkeley29歲，母親Margery de Vere19歲。她於1244年與John de la Sor or Lasieur在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。她去世於1380年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾武內享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Berkeley于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Sir Maurice Berkeley29岁，母亲Margery de Vere19岁。她于1244年与John de la Sor or Lasieur在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。她去世于1380年在英国英格兰可瓦爾武內享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Berkeley was born about 1325, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Maurice Berkeley, was 29 and her mother, Margery de Vere, was 19. She married John de la Sor or Lasieur in 1244, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. She died in 1380, in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Berkeley est née environ 1325, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Maurice Berkeley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery de Vere, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de la Sor or Lasieur en 1244, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Camborne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Berkeley um 1325 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Maurice Berkeley 29 und ihre Mutter Margery de Vere 19. Sie hat 1244 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England John de la Sor or Lasieur geheiratet. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Berkeley è nata il circa 1325 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Maurice Berkeley, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margery de Vere, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John de la Sor or Lasieur nel 1244, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Morì nel 1380, nel Camborne, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Berkeleyが約1325年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice Berkeleyは29歳，母Margery de Vereは19歳であった。1244年にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでJohn de la Sor or Lasieurと結婚した。彼女は1380年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルカンボルンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Berkeley(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Maurice Berkeley(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Vere(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 John de la Sor or Lasieur(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 캄본에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Maurice Berkeley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Vere, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John de la Sor or Lasieur em 1244, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Berkeley родилась около 1325 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Maurice Berkeley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Vere, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de la Sor or Lasieur в 1244 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности камборн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1325, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Maurice Berkeley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery de Vere, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John de la Sor or Lasieur en 1244, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1380, en Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
